title: What is "Joining"? heart2heart (read person 2 person) focused coordinated movement, 2gather unison movement
author: TonyLinog
excerpt: # What is "Joining"? heart2heart (read person 2 person) focused coordinated movement, 2gather unison movement
body:
# What is "Joining"? heart2heart (read person 2 person) focused coordinated movement, 2gather unison movement

## OVERVIEW
@TonyLinog : Wanted to start this @joshualinog maybe you already have an issue for this?? And/or can modify/tag this issue to get it where you think it should go. 

## FEATURES OF JOINING
- steps:
     1. one person declares puts forward a proposed movement
      2. The other person accepts The proposal and decides to unite their movement to the proposal and movement of the initial person 
     3. Along the way the second person who decided to join, also casts vision over the proposed movement 
     4. The initial person embraces this and themselves continue casting vision over the movement as both persons attempt to move in unison together toward the proposal 
     5. Mutual submission takes place and .... (Don't remember your exact words @TonyLinog )
